Package glide.api.models.configuration

Class AdvancedBaseClientConfiguration

  • java.lang.Object
    • glide.api.models.configuration.AdvancedBaseClientConfiguration
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    AdvancedGlideClientConfiguration, AdvancedGlideClusterClientConfiguration
    public abstract class AdvancedBaseClientConfiguration
extends java.lang.Object
    Advanced configuration settings class for creating a client. Shared settings for standalone and cluster clients.

    • Constructor Detail

      • AdvancedBaseClientConfiguration

        protected AdvancedBaseClientConfiguration​(AdvancedBaseClientConfiguration.AdvancedBaseClientConfigurationBuilder<?,​?> b)

    • Method Detail

      • getConnectionTimeout

        public java.lang.Integer getConnectionTimeout()
        The duration in milliseconds to wait for a TCP/TLS connection to complete. This applies both during initial client creation and any reconnection that may occur during request processing.

        If not explicitly set, a default value of 2000 milliseconds will be used by the Rust core.

        **Note**: A high connection timeout may lead to prolonged blocking of the entire command pipeline.

      • getTlsAdvancedConfiguration

        public TlsAdvancedConfiguration getTlsAdvancedConfiguration()
        The advanced TLS configuration settings.

        This allows for more granular control of TLS behavior, such as enabling an insecure mode that bypasses certificate validation.
